OLLAMA_BASE_URL.description: Base URL for local Ollama server (layout inference only).

TRANSLATE_TOOL_HOST.description: IP address the backend server binds to.

TRANSLATE_TOOL_PORT.description: Port the backend server listens on.

MAX_JOBS_IN_MEMORY.description: Maximum number of jobs retained in memory before eviction.

JOB_TTL_HOURS.description: Hours before a completed/failed job is evicted from the in-memory store.

PANJIT_LLM_BASE_URL.description: Base URL for Panjit OpenAI-compatible gateway. Required when Panjit provider is enabled.

PANJIT_API.description: API key for Panjit gateway. Secret — never log. Required when Panjit provider is enabled.

DEEPSEEK_BASE_URL.description: Base URL for DeepSeek API endpoint.

DEEPSEEK_API.description: API key for DeepSeek. Secret — never log. Required when DEEPSEEK_ENABLED=true.

DEEPSEEK_ENABLED.description: Enables DeepSeek provider in fallback chain. Accepts 'true'/'false' or '1'/'0'. Default: false.

OLLAMA_NUM_CTX.description: Backward-compat context window override applied to all model types when GENERAL_NUM_CTX / TRANSLATION_NUM_CTX are not set. New deployments should prefer the specific vars.

GENERAL_NUM_CTX.description: Context window (tokens) for general-purpose model calls. Fallback chain: GENERAL_NUM_CTX → OLLAMA_NUM_CTX → 4096.

TRANSLATION_NUM_CTX.description: Context window (tokens) for translation-dedicated model calls. Fallback chain: TRANSLATION_NUM_CTX → OLLAMA_NUM_CTX → 3072.

TERM_INJECT_HIGH_CONFIDENCE_UNVERIFIED.description: When true, also inject unverified terms with confidence >= TERM_INJECT_CONF_THRESHOLD into translation prompts. Migration escape hatch for deployments relying on the old confidence=1.0 bypass. Accepts 'true'/'false' or '1'/'0'. Default: false.

TERM_INJECT_CONF_THRESHOLD.description: Minimum confidence for unverified term injection when TERM_INJECT_HIGH_CONFIDENCE_UNVERIFIED=true. Has no effect when false. Default: 0.9.

LAYOUT_DETECTOR_MODEL_PATH.description: Local path to the Docling heron-101 ONNX weights directory (docling-project/docling-layout-heron-onnx). When unset, falls back to HuggingFace auto-download. Set for air-gapped / Docker-preloaded deployments. Not a secret.

LAYOUT_DETECTOR_ENABLED.description: Enable or disable the layout detector. Accepts 'true'/'false' or '1'/'0'. Default: true. Set to 'false' or '0' to revert to the round(y0,10pt) reading-order heuristic (rollback switch).

CHUNK_OVERLAP_TOKENS.description: Number of tokens of overlap between adjacent chunks for long-document chunking. Must be a positive integer. Has no effect when the document fits within the LLM context window (single-chunk path). Default: 50.

QE_ENABLED.description: Enable post-translation COMET/xCOMET quality evaluation and critique adoption gate. Accepts 'true'/'false' or '1'/'0'. Default: true (quality-metrics-gating AC-3). When false, GET /jobs/{id}/quality returns status: "disabled" and the critique loop falls back to the length-ratio heuristic (AC-8).

QE_MODEL_NAME.description: COMET/xCOMET model name (HuggingFace hub name or local path). Used only when QE_ENABLED=true. Default: Unbabel/wmt22-cometkiwi-da.

QE_DEVICE.description: Inference device for the QE model. Accepted values: cpu, cuda, mps. Falls back to cpu with WARNING on invalid value. Ignored when QE_ENABLED=false. Default: cpu.

TERM_EMBEDDING_MODEL.description: Embedding model name on the PANJIT endpoint used to vectorise source segments for term DB lookup. Default: Qwen3-Embedding-8B.

TERM_EMBEDDING_THRESHOLD.description: Cosine similarity threshold for a DB hit (float in (0.0, 1.0]). A segment/DB-term pair with similarity >= this value is treated as a hit; injection replaces extraction. Default: 0.75.

TERM_EXTRACTION_MODEL.description: LLM model name on the PANJIT endpoint used for term extraction on DB miss. Default: gemma4:latest.

JUDGE_ENABLED.description: Enable post-translation Gemma LLM-as-judge quality pass. Accepts 'true'/'false' or '1'/'0'. Default: false. When false, GET /jobs/{id}/judge returns judge_status: "disabled".

JUDGE_PROVIDER.description: Client used for the text judge pass: 'ollama' (default, local) or 'cloud' (routes via the providers.yml provider named by JUDGE_CLOUD_PROVIDER_ID). judge_layout() image scoring always stays local regardless of this setting (BR-95/ADR 0008).

JUDGE_MODEL.description: Model name for the text judge pass. Ollama model name when JUDGE_PROVIDER=ollama (must be pulled locally); cloud provider's model name when JUDGE_PROVIDER=cloud. Default: gemma3.

JUDGE_LAYOUT_MODEL.description: Local Ollama model name dedicated to judge_layout() image scoring. Always local regardless of JUDGE_PROVIDER (BR-95/ADR 0008). Default: gemma3.

JUDGE_CLOUD_PROVIDER_ID.description: providers.yml provider id used for the text judge pass when JUDGE_PROVIDER=cloud. Default: panjit.

JUDGE_MAX_ITERATIONS.description: Maximum judge re-translation loop iterations per job. Must be a positive integer. Default: 3.

LIBREOFFICE_PATH.description: Explicit path to the LibreOffice binary for legacy .doc/.xls/.ppt conversion. Empty (default) auto-detects via PATH lookup then common per-OS install locations.

LIBREOFFICE_TIMEOUT.description: Wall-clock timeout (seconds) for the LibreOffice headless conversion subprocess. Must be a positive integer. Default: 120.

OPENAI_TOTAL_TIMEOUT_SECONDS.description: Wall-clock total-duration ceiling (seconds) on every OpenAICompatibleClient completion, additive on top of the (connect, read) tuple. Positive float. Degrade-not-fail on expiry. Default: 480. See BR-100.

PDF_TABLE_ROW_GROWTH_ENABLED.description: Enables the bounded local table-row-growth pre-pass (BR-103, ADR-0013) run once in pdf_processor._dispatch_render before either PDF renderer backend. Accepts 'true'/'false' or '1'/'0'. Default: true. Set to false as a production kill-switch for the overlay-mode background-collision risk (a grown row's text/whitening shift but the preserved source table rule lines do not).

LAYOUT_QA_ENABLED.description: Enable the runtime layout-QA safety net on the PDF output path (BR-106): after a PDF is rendered, re-opens the output to measure BIoU regression and residual untranslated source text, emitting at most one aggregated job.warnings entry via warnings_callback. Fail-soft — never fails the job; PDF output path only. Accepts 'true'/'false' or '1'/'0'. Default: false.

LAYOUT_QA_MAX_BOXES_PER_PAGE.description: Performance short-circuit for the layout-QA pass (BR-106): a page whose source or rendered box count exceeds this value is skipped from BIoU matching and logged, bounding the per-page O(source_boxes × rendered_boxes) matching cost. Must be a positive integer. Ignored when LAYOUT_QA_ENABLED=false. Default: 500.

QWEN_CONTEXT_FLOW_ENABLED.description: Gates the dynamic-scenario context-flow injection (build_strategy(..., enable_context_flow=...)), including — since cloud-doc-context-summary — whether the one-sentence document-context summary (BR-109) is generated by and injected via the ACTIVE cloud translation client (PANJIT/DeepSeek), not only local Ollama. Name is historical (predates multi-provider support) and is now provider-agnostic. Accepts 'true'/'false' or '1'/'0'. Default: 1 (enabled).

JSON_STRUCTURED_TRANSLATION_ENABLED.description: Enable JSON-structured translation I/O for both the table and body paths. Accepts '1'/'0' or 'true'/'false'. Default: 1. When disabled, both paths use the legacy pipe-grid / plain-text pipeline unconditionally.
